title: vriesea monacorum
intro: Vriesea monacorum, also known as the yellow Vriesea or Vriesea, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family. It is a terrestrial epiphyte that is native to Central and South America, with its leaves and flowers emitting a strong, pungent smell when touched. The medicinal properties of Vriesea monacorum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
